channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supergirl Trailer Released Starring Milly Alcock and Jason Momoa, Hits Cinemas June 26
item.description: The official trailer for 'Supergirl', directed by Craig Gillespie, has been released, generating excitement among superhero film fans. The movie features Milly Alcock taking on the role of Supergirl, ...

item.title: NHL introduces real-time playoff salary cap tool for team compliance
item.description: The National Hockey League (NHL) has introduced a new policy requiring teams to stay under a playoff salary cap, marking the end of a long-standing loophole where clubs could exceed the cap by using p...

item.title: LTFRB Approves 10% Fare Discount for Yanson Group Buses During Holy Week 2026
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has approved a 10% fare discount for passengers riding buses operated by the Yanson Group of Bus Companies from Good Friday to Easter S...

item.title: Treasury Confirms Timely Payment of Sh53.56bn Bond Interest, Clears Arrears Confusion
item.description: The National Treasury of Kenya has clarified concerns around Treasury bond interest payments worth Sh53.56 billion for May and June 2025. The Treasury stated that all payments were made on time and fu...

item.title: Metrobank Launches H.A.N.D.S. to Help Filipinos Manage Finances Amid Uncertain Times
item.description: Metrobank has introduced H.A.N.D.S., a practical financial guide designed to help Filipinos manage their money more effectively, especially during uncertain times. H.A.N.D.S. focuses on five key actio...

item.title: Legal Review of Nyamira Hospital in Kericho Mass Grave Investigation
item.description: Investigations into the mass grave discovered in Kericho have shifted focus from murder to possible criminal negligence, mishandling of human remains, and failures in documentation. Detectives are now...

item.title: UCP MLA Advocates for Alberta Independence Referendum, Premier Smith Maintains Neutral Stance
item.description: Recent developments within Premier Danielle Smith’s United Conservative Party (UCP) highlight a growing separatist sentiment among some members. Jason Stephan, MLA for Red Deer-South and parliamentary...

item.title: E.M Hospital launches modern CT scan and dialysis services to serve locals
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Deputy Minister for Health, Dr Florence Samizi, has praised E.M Hospital in Kigamboni for making major investments in health technology. The hospital recently launched a modern CT ...

item.title: After transgender rights bill amendment, confusion over validity of 32,000 self‑identified TG certificates
item.description: After President Droupadi Murmu gave assent to the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, transgender community members across India are worried about the fate of over 32,000 ...

item.title: Ukraine Targets Ust-Luga Port in Multiple Drone Strikes, Disrupting Oil Exports
item.description: On Tuesday, Ukrainian drones attacked Russia's Ust-Luga port on the Baltic Sea for the fifth time in just ten days, targeting the oil loading facilities managed by Transneft. This series of strikes fo...

item.title: King Charles to visit US to strengthen diplomatic ties amid UK-US tensions
item.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla are scheduled to visit the United States in late April, marking a long-planned trip to commemorate the 250th anniversary of US independence. The visit, officially advise...

item.title: Labor government halves fuel excise to address Australia’s petrol price crisis
item.description: The Albanese government has taken emergency action to tackle soaring petrol prices as Australians face mounting cost-of-living pressures. On Monday, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese convened a national...

item.title: Philippine Households Increasingly Adopt Solar Power Amid Fuel Crisis
item.description: As fuel prices remain unstable and power outages persist in many areas, more Filipino households are considering solar energy as a practical solution rather than a luxury. The recent surge in interest...

item.title: Fraudster in grandparent scam sentenced to house arrest and restitution instead of prison
item.description: Charles Gillen, a 25-year-old born in Sierra Leone and raised in Winnipeg, has been sentenced in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, to serve his remaining sentence under house arrest instead of re...

item.title: Government warns fuel price relief could take weeks despite excise cut
item.description: The Australian government has begun implementing a temporary halving of the national fuel excise, a measure aimed at easing cost-of-living pressures as global fuel prices remain high. Starting on Apri...

item.title: DCI Investigates Mortuary Record Irregularities at Nyamira Hospital After Discovery of Remains
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI), led by Mohamed Amin, has uncovered serious lapses in mortuary management at Nyamira Teaching and Referral Hospital following the discovery of dozens o...

item.title: Structural Flaws in Disaster Funding Formula Undermine Risk-Based Allocation in India
item.description: The article discusses critical issues in the 16th Finance Commission’s allocation of disaster funds to Indian States. Despite Odisha being one of India’s most disaster-prone States, with a long coastl...

item.title: Man arrested for arson after fire severely damages Downtown Eastside grocery store
item.description: Vancouver police have arrested a man in connection with a fire that caused significant damage to a grocery store in the Downtown Eastside. The incident occurred around 5:30 p.m. on Monday at the Neste...

item.title: Uber Expands Driverless Robotaxi Services in Dubai and Boosts Investment in WeRide
item.description: Uber and Chinese autonomous vehicle company WeRide have officially launched fully driverless robotaxi services in Dubai, marking a significant milestone in the region's autonomous mobility initiatives...

item.title: Half of Tanzanian Banks Achieve One-Third Female Leadership
item.description: Almost half of Tanzania’s licensed banks have reached the important benchmark of having at least one-third female representation in both boardrooms and senior management. According to Sauda Msemo, Dep...
